scene_context.environment_request: Fix the VLM review issues: trim both raised divider endpoints so they terminate flush against the courtyard perimeter inner faces without penetrating or protruding; change nothing else.
scene_context.scene_description: A robot courtyard with a blue robot, an elevated charging goal reached by a wooden ramp beyond a switch-operated center gate, a broken-paving hazard with a wide bypass, and a pushable supply crate aligned with a cyan delivery target along a straight hazard-free lane on the robot side.

objective_focus.description: The blue robot enters the charging goal while the center gate remains closed.

route_guidance.reason: No ground route was found. The objective may require jumping, moving an object, or changing a mechanism.

interaction_guidance.reason: The current assertion does not require moving another object to a target.

action_guidance.reason: No immediate risk or interaction boundary is close.

checks.description: The blue robot enters the charging goal while the center gate remains closed.
The blue robot never enters the floor switch region during the closed-gate attempt.
